strengths: 6+ years of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB — directly matching the primary stack
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, satisfying the AI agent development requirement
Proven multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, Python-adjacent ecosystems) with cloud/containerization exposure via AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly named in the resume, though adjacent Node/TypeScript and testing expertise is extensive
Kotlin is not listed, with Java experience appearing in earlier roles
PostgreSQL is not explicitly mentioned, though MongoDB and MySQL are covered

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Architecture, TDD, and craftsmanship track record

response.justification: Bogdan brings well over a decade of full-stack delivery directly aligned with the primary TypeScript/Node.js/React stack, including production work at Optilyz on AWS CDK, MongoDB, and React, and GraphQL/TypeScript microservices at RIDE Capital. His current role at re:cinq centers on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — a rare and direct match for the AI agent development requirement. Combined with a strong craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public workshops on testing and web internals), multi-language fluency, and Kubernetes/Docker deployment experience, he presents as a high-fit senior contributor ready to design and ship end-to-end features in this environment.
